title: PRD: Bulk user provisioning (SCIM)
text:
# PRD — Bulk user provisioning (SCIM)
Product area: User Management & SSO
Status: Not started
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request bulk user provisioning (scim). This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the User Management & SSO area.

## Proposed solution
Implement bulk user provisioning (scim) with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce User Management & SSO-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Backlog — not yet prioritized.
